user:create: Allows creating new users in the system.
user:read: Allows viewing information of registered users.
user:update: Allows modifying information of existing users.
user:delete: Allows deleting users from the system.
role:create: Allows creating new roles in the system.
role:read: Allows viewing information of registered roles.
role:update: Allows modifying information of existing roles.
role:delete: Allows deleting roles from the system.
permission:create: Allows creating new permissions in the system.
permission:read: Allows viewing information of registered permissions.
permission:update: Allows modifying information of existing permissions.
permission:delete: Allows deleting permissions from the system.
person:create: Allows creating new persons in the system.
person:read: Allows viewing information of registered persons.
person:update: Allows modifying information of existing persons.
person:delete: Allows deleting persons from the system.
company:create: Allows creating new companies in the system.
company:read: Allows viewing information of registered companies.
company:update: Allows modifying information of existing companies.
company:delete: Allows deleting companies from the system.
vehicle:create: Allows creating new vehicles in the system.
vehicle:read: Allows viewing information of registered vehicles.
vehicle:update: Allows modifying information of existing vehicles.
vehicle:delete: Allows deleting vehicles from the system.
car:create: Allows creating new cars in the system.
car:read: Allows viewing information of registered cars.
car:update: Allows modifying information of existing cars.
car:delete: Allows deleting cars from the system.
motorcycle:create: Allows creating new motorcycles in the system.
motorcycle:read: Allows viewing information of registered motorcycles.
motorcycle:update: Allows modifying information of existing motorcycles.
motorcycle:delete: Allows deleting motorcycles from the system.
purchase_sale:create: Allows creating new purchase-sale contracts in the system.
purchase_sale:read: Allows viewing information of registered purchase-sale contracts.
purchase_sale:update: Allows modifying information of existing purchase-sale contracts.
purchase_sale:delete: Allows deleting purchase-sale contracts from the system.
ml:predict: Allows accessing the prediction features of the system.
ml:retrain: Allows accessing the training features of the system.
ml:models: Allows managing the system machine-learning models.
